sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales_data (id INT, revenue FLOAT, expenses FLOAT);
INSERT INTO sales_data (id, revenue, expenses) VALUES (1, 5000, 3000), (2, 7000, 4000), (3, 6000, 3500);
UPDATE sales_data SET revenue = revenue * 1.1 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT REGR_SLOPE(revenue, expenses) AS slope FROM sales_data;
SELECT id, REGR_SLOPE(revenue, expenses) OVER () AS overall_slope FROM sales_data;
